title: carpinus rupestris
intro: Carpinus rupestris, also known as rock carpinus or Korean hornbeam, is a deciduous tree or shrub species native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce swelling, prevent infection, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Carpinus rupestris include the potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the bark, leaves, and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
